title: High Latency — Service Response Time Degradation
summary: Service p95/p99 latency is above SLO thresholds. Users may be experiencing slow responses or timeouts.
likely_causes: Traffic spike exceeding current replica capacity
Database query slowdown (missing index, lock contention)
Downstream service degradation (network latency, dependency timeout)
Recent deployment introduced a slow code path
diagnostic_steps: Check replicas vs RPS in Grafana — is CPU/memory near limits?
Compare latency timeline against deployment events
Inspect slow query logs if database-backed

action_params.note: Scale out to handle load. If caused by bad deployment, prefer rollout_restart or argocd_rollback.

escalate_if: All replicas at CPU limit — scaling will not help
